case_title: SAN FRANCIACIMOMNUH VS. GLORIA LOPEZ et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, GLORIA LOPEZ, GRISELDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 38 DAKOTA ST., CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT******ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT HAS BEEN CANCELED***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
